title: Eternity
body:

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54da892dc9ee761d5cdab0b32d883a65ccb5edf.png)
[![link_youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed14b526841e09e3e52db72a2ac32071c74c02d.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@Bluebird-Studios-Official)
[![link_discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c67e4bef23af27e8404d1106a0746a46da45843.png)](https://discord.gg/hjtaaJHcCN)
[![link_telegram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb0583fd89cdc327e1b4de1bd797fbca93c6dcd.png)](https://t.me/bluebirdstudios)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54da892dc9ee761d5cdab0b32d883a65ccb5edf.png)

In minecraft there are things that we do not use often, and we have found a solution to this problem. This mod adds new swords that cannot be broken, but they need to be constantly fuelled with such items!

### ⚙️ Changelogs


<details>
<summary>Version 1.2 - Tropical Explorer - RELEASE NOW✨ </summary>

### New item:
- Bottomless bag
- Fragment of the librarian's soul
- Book of Discoveries (not functional)

**Music disk:**
- Frogadon
- Frogbadza
- Snowflake 
- Nymph's dance

### New blocks:
- Gramophone
- Red mushroom table
- Big monstera
- Berry chandelier

![frogblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4bb9801b06e50f8ef772657798cc286c0217797_0.webp)

### New entity:
- Froglet - The first creature that will help the player in the study of the mod. Gives the player the ability to study items, for further possibility of their use.

![frog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e3a55c557f4d5133b22e5215da016ff3b60cf62_0.webp)

### New mechanics and additions:
- **Research mechanics** - the froglet will help you unlock the active abilities of weapons, descriptions, and stars. All you need to do is find the item and study it. The study is done by assembling the puzzle..
- **Basic quest system** - via a dialog box. There are only story quests that help you progress through the mod.
- **Advanced cooldown system** - that is tied to a specific item, rather than to all items in a category

### Bug fixes and changes:
- The abilities of all swords have been changed and improved
- Item's active abilities are locked until research.
- Description and stars are hidden until research.
- Coin and star textures have been updated. They are now animated.
- If you break the block the base on which the amethyst spikes are attached, then they fall out as blocks of amethyst shards.
- The mining speed of the amethyst shards has been changed to be more correct.
- Removed animation of the amethyst sword being in the recharge phase.
- In the creative tab, items were re-categorised.
- And other minor bugs.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Version 1.1 - Stars and Coins </summary>

### New item:
- Copper coin
- Platinum coin
- Gold coin

Collect coins, and in the update 1.4 you will be able to exchange them for valuable items from the tropical explorer.

### New mechanics and additions:
- **Stardom** is a system that changes the functionality of swords. The more stars you have, the better your weapon is. Damage, duration of effects, durability and more are now completely. dependent on it!
- Stars are visible when you hover over an item in your inventory.
- Added a small description for items.

### Bug fixes and changes:
- Changing the name of the pig armour, to divine pig armor
- The texture of the pig armour has been updated
- Saddle and pig armour are now interchangeable 
- The amethyst shards made no sound when they fell.
- Amethyst shards cannot be placed on top of each other.
- Amethyst spikes can no longer be attached to each other. 
- Amethyst spikes on the side or underneath the block did no damage.
- And other minor bugs.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Version 1.05 - Pig Update</summary>

### New item:
- Pig Armour - gives protection to your pig, as well as the ability to walk on lava!

### Swords functionality has been updated and added:
- Carrot Bat - allows you to control your pig when you hold it in your hand!
- Golden Carrot Bat - allows your pig to walk on water!

### Updated other points like:
- Stabilised Amethyst Shards have changed their name to Amethyst Spikes.
- Amethyst shards can be placed in water.
- Amethyst shards fall down if you break the block under them.
- Amethyst spikes can be attached to walls.
- Crafting items have been added to the crafting book.

### Bug Fixes:
- Changed the display of discarded items for ancient cascade and sparkle.
- Amethyst sword can no longer consume mortar indefinitely.
- Inventory is no longer lost at the beginning and end when consuming amethyst mortar.
- Wax puddle no longer falls through transparent blocks .
- In single player mode, if you press pause with a candle sword active, it no longer burns out!
- Fixed problems with debug particles.
- And other minor bugs.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Version 1.0 - Swords Update</summary>

### This version includes 7 swords:
- Amethyst Sword - _mending amethyst mortar_
- Candle Sword - _mending candle + flint and steel_
- Carrot Bat _- planting_
- Golden Carrot Bat - _planting_
- Ancient Form _- eternity_
- Ancient Spark _- eternity_
- Ancient Cascade _- eternity_
### New blocks:
- Amethyst Shards
- Stabilized amethyst Shards
### New amethyst functionality has been added!

</details>



Swords and their component parts can be **found in suspicious gravel and sand**, with the help of archaeology. In chests in **shipwrecks, in the mansion, in the geode.** Each sword has unique abilities. One can be eaten, the other's damage increases in proportion to the remaining durability. Learn all the mechanics in the game!

 **_[More information in Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/eternity./gallery)_**


### ❗️ Be sure to download [BlueBird Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/bluebirdlib) ❗️
